---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature you would like.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe how the feature might work. Include any API or CLI design ideas if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you have thought about.

## Additional context

Any other relevant detail, links, or prior art.
